urdu transliteration text: Shehar e sarwar ki abo hawa aur hai
english translation text: The atmosphere in the city of Husain (a.s.) is beyond explanation

urdu transliteration text: Shehar e sarwar ki abo hawa aur hai,
english translation text: The atmosphere in the city of Husain (a.s.) is beyond description,

urdu transliteration text: Janaten aur hai Karbala aur hai
english translation text: The heavens are heavenly but Karbala is something else

urdu transliteration text: Mein hoon beemar jane de Karb O bala,
english translation text: I AM ILL, LET ME GO TO KARBALA FOR MY CURE,

urdu transliteration text: Aye Tabeeb Is Marz ki Dawa aur hai
english translation text: O DOCTOR! THE CURE FOR THIS ILLNESS IS SOMETHING ELSE

urdu transliteration text: Doosra koi aur Shabbir kaise mile,
english translation text: HOW CAN YOU FIND ANOTHER BEING LIKE HUSSAIN (A.S.),

urdu transliteration text: Kya Khuda ke ilawa Khuda aur hai
english translation text: IT IS LIKE ASKING IF YOU CAN FIND ANOTHER GOD BESIDES ALLAH

urdu transliteration text: Aye Mufasar Bata kya tamasha hai ye,
english translation text: OH INTERPRETER, TELL ME WHAT IS THE PROBLEM,

urdu transliteration text: Ayatein aur hai tarjuma aur hai
english translation text: THE AAYATS OF THE QURAN ARE ONE THING BUT THE MEANING IS JUST SOMETHING ELSE

urdu transliteration text: Doosro se Ali ka taqabul kya hai,
english translation text: HOW CAN YOU COMPARE ALI TO ANYONE ELSE,

urdu transliteration text: Hadse aur hai mojza aur hai
english translation text: AN ACCIDENT IS ONE THING AND A MIRACLE IS SOMETHING ELSE

urdu transliteration text: Hans ke dewar-e-Kaaba yeh kehne lagi,
english translation text: THE DOOR OF THE KA’BA SMILED AND PROCLAIMED,

urdu transliteration text: Umme Haider tera rasta aur hai,
english translation text: OH MOTHER OF ALI (A.S.), THE PLACE FOR YOU TO ENTER IS A DIFFERENT ONE

urdu transliteration text: Boli Maryam Taqabul na karna mera
english translation text: MARYAM SAID, DO NOT COMPARE ME,

urdu transliteration text: Kibriya ki qasam Fatima aur hai
english translation text: I SWEAR BY THE ALMIGHTY, FATIMA (S.A.) IS SOMETHING ELSE

urdu transliteration text: Hurmala aur Hur kaisai ek sath hon,
english translation text: HOW CAN HURMALA AND HUR EVER BE COMPARED,

urdu transliteration text: Lanatein aur hai martaba aur hai
english translation text: BEING CURSED IS ONE THING AND ACHEIVING STATUS IS SOMETHING ELSE
